name: ripple-memory-hooks
description: Pluggable Ripple Memory hooks for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Injects lightweight project memory through Codex hooks.
interface.longDescription: Adds a removable Codex hook adapter for Ripple Memory. The adapter translates Codex hook events into the host-neutral Ripple hook protocol and keeps memory logic in the shared engine.
defaultPrompt: Use Ripple Memory for this coding session
